name: United States Gasoline Fund, LP
summary: United States Gasoline Fund, LP (UGA) is a Delaware limited partnership and commodity pool that issues limited partnership interests (shares) traded on NYSE Arca. UGA seeks to track daily changes in the spot price of RBOB gasoline by investing primarily in gasoline futures contracts on NYMEX and ICE Futures, supported by collateral holdings, with USCF LLC serving as general partner and manager.

products.name: UGA Shares
products.description: Exchange-traded limited partnership interests tracking daily percentage changes in RBOB gasoline spot prices via futures contracts, traded on NYSE Arca.

partnerships.description: Serves as marketing agent for UGA; fees paid by USCF.

partnerships.partner_name: The Bank of New York Mellon
partnerships.description: Serves as administrator, custodian, and provides accounting and transfer agent services for UGA since April 1, 2020.
